PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?characterLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q18389644 wdt:P161 ?actor .
  ?actor rdfs:label ?actorLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?actorLabel) , 'en'))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?actorLabel) , 'cara'))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?actorLabel) , 'gee'))
  ?actor wdt:P453 ?character .
  ?character rdfs:label ?characterLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?characterLabel) , 'en'))
}
